metadata.name: sss_token
metadata.description: Solana Stablecoin Standard — Core Token Program

docs: The SSS-Token program.

instructions.name: add_to_blacklist
docs: Adds an address to the blacklist (SSS-2 only).
Feature-gated: requires enable_transfer_hook.
Creates a BlacklistEntry and freezes the target's token account.

accounts.name: operator
docs: The blacklister operator — must have Blacklister role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration PDA.

accounts.name: operator_role
docs: The operator's Blacklister role record.

accounts.name: blacklist_entry
docs: The blacklist entry PDA to be created.

accounts.name: target
docs: The target wallet being blacklisted.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The Token-2022 mint account.

accounts.name: target_token_account
docs: The target's token account to be frozen.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token-2022 program for freeze CPI.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for account creation.

instructions.name: burn_tokens
docs: Burns tokens from the burner's account.
Validates burner role and pause state before burning.

accounts.name: burner
docs: The burner — must have an active Burner role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration PDA.

accounts.name: pause_state
docs: The pause state PDA — checked to ensure operations are not paused.

accounts.name: burner_role
docs: The burner's role record PDA — must be an active Burner.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The Token-2022 mint account.

accounts.name: burner_token_account
docs: The burner's token account to burn from.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token-2022 program.

instructions.name: freeze_account
docs: Freezes a target token account.
Requires MasterAuthority or Blacklister role.

accounts.name: operator
docs: The operator — must have MasterAuthority or Blacklister role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration PDA (also the freeze authority).

accounts.name: operator_role
docs: The operator's role record PDA.
Must be either MasterAuthority or Blacklister with active status.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The Token-2022 mint account.

accounts.name: target_token_account
docs: The target token account to freeze or thaw.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token-2022 program.

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initializes a new stablecoin with Token-2022 extensions.
Creates the mint, config PDA, pause state PDA, and master authority role.
Extension flags are immutable after this call.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The authority who will become the MasterAuthority.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The Token-2022 mint account to be created.
This must be a new, uninitialized account.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration PDA.

accounts.name: pause_state
docs: The pause state PDA — initialized to not paused.

accounts.name: master_role
docs: The MasterAuthority role record PDA for the authority.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token-2022 program.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for account creation.

accounts.name: rent
docs: Rent sysvar.

instructions.name: mint_tokens
docs: Mints tokens to a recipient.
Validates minter role, pause state, and quota before minting.
Creates recipient ATA if it doesn't exist.

accounts.name: minter
docs: The minter — must have an active Minter role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration PDA.

accounts.name: pause_state
docs: The pause state PDA — checked to ensure operations are not paused.

accounts.name: minter_role
docs: The minter's role record PDA — must be an active Minter.

accounts.name: minter_quota
docs: The minter's quota PDA — tracks usage against limits.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The Token-2022 mint account.

accounts.name: recipient_token_account
docs: The recipient's associated token account — created if it doesn't exist.
or by the token program if it already exists.

accounts.name: recipient
docs: The recipient wallet address.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token-2022 program.

accounts.name: associated_token_program
docs: Associated token program for ATA creation.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for account creation.

instructions.name: pause
docs: Pauses all token operations (mint, burn, transfer).
Requires Pauser or MasterAuthority role.
Does NOT prevent freeze/thaw/seize.

accounts.name: operator
docs: The operator — must have Pauser or MasterAuthority role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration PDA.

accounts.name: pause_state
docs: The pause state PDA to be updated.

accounts.name: operator_role
docs: The operator's role record PDA.
Must be either Pauser or MasterAuthority with active status.

instructions.name: remove_from_blacklist
docs: Removes an address from the blacklist (SSS-2 only).
Feature-gated: requires enable_transfer_hook.
Deactivates the BlacklistEntry. Does NOT auto-thaw.

accounts.name: operator
docs: The blacklister operator — must have Blacklister role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration PDA.

accounts.name: operator_role
docs: The operator's Blacklister role record.

accounts.name: blacklist_entry
docs: The blacklist entry PDA to be deactivated.

accounts.name: target
docs: The target wallet being removed from blacklist.

instructions.name: seize
docs: Seizes all tokens from a frozen, blacklisted account (SSS-2 only).
Feature-gated: requires both enable_transfer_hook and enable_permanent_delegate.
Uses permanent delegate authority to transfer without owner consent.

accounts.name: seizer
docs: The seizer operator — must have Seizer role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration PDA (also acts as permanent delegate).

accounts.name: seizer_role
docs: The seizer's role record PDA.

accounts.name: blacklist_entry
docs: The blacklist entry for the source — must be active.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The Token-2022 mint account.

accounts.name: source_token_account
docs: The source token account to seize from — must be frozen.

accounts.name: source_authority
docs: The owner of the source token account.

accounts.name: treasury_token_account
docs: The treasury/destination token account to receive seized tokens.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token-2022 program.

instructions.name: thaw_account
docs: Thaws a frozen token account.
Requires MasterAuthority or Blacklister role.

accounts.name: operator
docs: The operator — must have MasterAuthority or Blacklister role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration PDA (also the freeze authority).

accounts.name: operator_role
docs: The operator's role record PDA.
Must be either MasterAuthority or Blacklister with active status.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The Token-2022 mint account.

accounts.name: target_token_account
docs: The target token account to freeze or thaw.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token-2022 program.

instructions.name: transfer_authority
docs: Transfers MasterAuthority to a new key.
Only the current MasterAuthority can call. Old authority is deactivated.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The current MasterAuthority.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration PDA.

accounts.name: old_master_role
docs: The current authority's MasterAuthority role record — will be deactivated.

accounts.name: new_master_role
docs: The new authority's MasterAuthority role record — will be created.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for account creation.

instructions.name: unpause
docs: Resumes all token operations.
Requires Pauser or MasterAuthority role.

accounts.name: operator
docs: The operator — must have Pauser or MasterAuthority role.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration PDA.

accounts.name: pause_state
docs: The pause state PDA to be updated.

accounts.name: operator_role
docs: The operator's role record PDA.
Must be either Pauser or MasterAuthority with active status.

instructions.name: update_minter
docs: Creates or updates a minter with a quota.
Only MasterAuthority can call. Creates both role record and quota PDAs.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The authority — must be the current MasterAuthority.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration PDA.

accounts.name: authority_role
docs: The authority's MasterAuthority role record.

accounts.name: minter_role
docs: The minter's role record PDA — initialized if needed.

accounts.name: minter_quota
docs: The minter's quota PDA — initialized if needed.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for account creation.

instructions.name: update_roles
docs: Creates or updates a role for a given key.
Only MasterAuthority can call. Cannot grant MasterAuthority (use transfer_authority).

accounts.name: authority
docs: The authority — must be the current MasterAuthority.

accounts.name: config
docs: The stablecoin configuration PDA.

accounts.name: authority_role
docs: The authority's MasterAuthority role record.

accounts.name: target_role
docs: The target holder's role record PDA — initialized if needed.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for account creation.

errors.name: NotAuthorized
errors.msg: Not authorized: the signer lacks the required role for this operation

errors.name: ConfigImmutable
errors.msg: Configuration is immutable: permanent_delegate, transfer_hook, and default_account_frozen cannot be changed after initialization

errors.name: FeatureNotEnabled
errors.msg: Feature not enabled: this operation requires enable_transfer_hook to be true at initialization

errors.name: AlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Already initialized: a stablecoin config already exists for this mint

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: Invalid mint: the provided mint account does not match the config's mint

errors.name: TokensPaused
errors.msg: Tokens paused: mint, burn, and transfer operations are currently suspended

errors.name: MinterNotFound
errors.msg: Minter not found: no active minter role record exists for this address

errors.name: MinterQuotaExceeded
errors.msg: Minter quota exceeded: the requested mint amount would exceed the minter's allowed limit

errors.name: BurnerNotFound
errors.msg: Burner not found: no active burner role record exists for this address

errors.name: AccountNotFrozen
errors.msg: Account not frozen: the target token account is not currently frozen

errors.name: AccountAlreadyFrozen
errors.msg: Account already frozen: the target token account is already in a frozen state

errors.name: AccountAlreadyBlacklisted
errors.msg: Account already blacklisted: an active blacklist entry already exists for this address

errors.name: AccountNotBlacklisted
errors.msg: Account not blacklisted: no active blacklist entry exists for this address

errors.name: BlacklisterNotFound
errors.msg: Blacklister not found: no active blacklister role record exists for this address

errors.name: SeizeNotAuthorized
errors.msg: Seize not authorized: the signer lacks the seizer role or permanent_delegate is not enabled

errors.name: PauserNotFound
errors.msg: Pauser not found: no active pauser role record exists for this address

errors.name: InvalidRoleType
errors.msg: Invalid role type: the provided role type is not recognized by the program

errors.name: RoleAlreadyActive
errors.msg: Role already active: an active role record already exists for this holder and role type

errors.name: RoleNotActive
errors.msg: Role not active: the role record for this holder is not currently active

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Invalid amount: the provided amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Overflow: arithmetic overflow occurred during supply or quota calculation

errors.name: InvalidConfig
errors.msg: Invalid config: one or more configuration parameters are out of valid range

errors.name: TransferHookCheckFailed
errors.msg: Transfer hook check failed: the transfer was rejected by the compliance hook

errors.name: NameTooLong
errors.msg: Name too long: the token name exceeds the maximum length of 32 bytes

errors.name: SymbolTooLong
errors.msg: Symbol too long: the token symbol exceeds the maximum length of 10 bytes

errors.name: UriTooLong
errors.msg: URI too long: the metadata URI exceeds the maximum length of 200 bytes

errors.name: ReasonTooLong
errors.msg: Reason too long: the blacklist reason exceeds the maximum length of 100 bytes

errors.name: PermanentDelegateNotEnabled
errors.msg: Permanent delegate not enabled: seize requires enable_permanent_delegate to be true

errors.name: BlacklistEntryRequired
errors.msg: Blacklist entry required: seize requires the target address to have an active blacklist entry

errors.name: AlreadyPaused
errors.msg: Already paused: token operations are already suspended

errors.name: NotPaused
errors.msg: Not paused: token operations are not currently suspended

types.name: AccountFrozen
docs: Event emitted when a token account is frozen.

fields.name: mint
docs: The mint address.

fields.name: target
docs: The frozen token account address.

fields.name: operator
docs: The operator who froze the account.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp.

types.name: AccountThawed
docs: Event emitted when a token account is thawed.

fields.name: mint
docs: The mint address.

fields.name: target
docs: The thawed token account address.

fields.name: operator
docs: The operator who thawed the account.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp.

types.name: AddedToBlacklist
docs: Event emitted when an address is added to the blacklist.

fields.name: mint
docs: The mint address.

fields.name: target
docs: The blacklisted wallet address.

fields.name: reason
docs: The reason for blacklisting.

fields.name: operator
docs: The operator who performed the blacklisting.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp.

types.name: AuthorityTransferred
docs: Event emitted when authority is transferred.

fields.name: mint
docs: The mint address.

fields.name: old_authority
docs: The previous authority.

fields.name: new_authority
docs: The new authority.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp.

types.name: BlacklistEntry
docs: A record of an address that has been blacklisted for a specific mint (SSS-2 only).
Derived as a PDA from `[SEED_BLACKLIST, mint.key(), target.key()]`.
When an address is blacklisted, their token account is also frozen.
Entries are never deleted; `active` is set to `false` when removed.

fields.name: mint
docs: The mint this blacklist entry applies to.

fields.name: target
docs: The wallet address that is blacklisted.

fields.name: reason
docs: Human-readable reason for the blacklisting (max 100 bytes).

fields.name: added_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the address was blacklisted.

fields.name: added_by
docs: The operator who added this blacklist entry.

fields.name: active
docs: Whether this blacklist entry is currently active.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed for this account.

types.name: InitializeArgs
docs: Arguments for the initialize instruction.

fields.name: name
docs: Human-readable name for the stablecoin (max 32 bytes).

fields.name: symbol
docs: Ticker symbol for the stablecoin (max 10 bytes).

fields.name: uri
docs: Metadata URI for off-chain metadata (max 200 bytes).

fields.name: decimals
docs: Number of decimal places for the token.

fields.name: enable_permanent_delegate
docs: Whether to enable the permanent delegate extension.

fields.name: enable_transfer_hook
docs: Whether to enable the transfer hook extension.

fields.name: default_account_frozen
docs: Whether new token accounts should be frozen by default.

fields.name: hook_program_id
docs: The transfer hook program ID (required if enable_transfer_hook is true).

types.name: MinterQuota
docs: Tracks the minting allowance for a specific minter on a specific mint.
Derived as a PDA from `[SEED_QUOTA, mint.key(), minter.key()]`.
The `used` counter is checked against `limit` before each mint operation.
A `limit` of 0 indicates unlimited minting.

fields.name: mint
docs: The mint this quota applies to.

fields.name: minter
docs: The minter's public key.

fields.name: limit
docs: Maximum number of tokens allowed to be minted in the period. 0 = unlimited.

fields.name: used
docs: Number of tokens already minted in the current period.

fields.name: period
docs: The time period over which the quota resets.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed for this account.

types.name: PauseState
docs: Tracks the pause state for a specific stablecoin mint.
Derived as a PDA from `[SEED_PAUSE, mint.key()]`.
When paused, mint, burn, and transfer operations are blocked.
Compliance operations (freeze, thaw, seize) still work while paused.

fields.name: mint
docs: The mint this pause state applies to.

fields.name: paused
docs: Whether token operations are currently paused.

fields.name: paused_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the last pause/unpause occurred.

fields.name: paused_by
docs: The operator who last paused/unpaused.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed for this account.

types.name: QuotaPeriod
docs: The time period over which a minter's quota resets.

types.name: RemovedFromBlacklist
docs: Event emitted when an address is removed from the blacklist.

fields.name: mint
docs: The mint address.

fields.name: target
docs: The wallet address removed from blacklist.

fields.name: operator
docs: The operator who removed the entry.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp.

types.name: RoleRecord
docs: A record of a role granted to a specific key for a specific mint.
Derived as a PDA from `[SEED_ROLE, mint.key(), holder.key(), &[role as u8]]`.
Role records are never deleted. When revoked, `active` is set to `false`.

fields.name: mint
docs: The mint this role applies to.

fields.name: holder
docs: The public key that holds this role.

fields.name: role
docs: The type of role granted.

fields.name: active
docs: Whether this role is currently active.

fields.name: granted_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the role was granted.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed for this account.

types.name: RoleType
docs: The type of role that can be assigned to a key holder.
Each role grants specific permissions within the SSS program:
- `MasterAuthority`: Full administrative control, can manage all other roles
- `Minter`: Can mint new tokens up to their quota
- `Burner`: Can burn tokens from their own account
- `Pauser`: Can pause/unpause all token operations
- `Blacklister`: Can add/remove addresses from the blacklist (SSS-2)
- `Seizer`: Can seize tokens from frozen, blacklisted accounts (SSS-2)

types.name: StablecoinConfig
docs: Primary configuration account for a stablecoin deployed via the SSS program.
Derived as a PDA from `[SEED_CONFIG, mint.key()]`.
The `enable_permanent_delegate`, `enable_transfer_hook`, and `default_account_frozen`
flags are set once at initialization and are **immutable forever**. Any instruction
that attempts to modify them after init will fail with `ConfigImmutable`.

fields.name: authority
docs: The master authority who can manage roles and transfer authority.

fields.name: mint
docs: The Token-2022 mint address this config governs.

fields.name: name
docs: Human-readable name for the stablecoin (max 32 bytes).

fields.name: symbol
docs: Ticker symbol for the stablecoin (max 10 bytes).

fields.name: uri
docs: Metadata URI for off-chain metadata (max 200 bytes).

fields.name: decimals
docs: Number of decimal places for the token.

fields.name: enable_permanent_delegate
docs: Whether the permanent delegate extension is enabled (immutable after init).

fields.name: enable_transfer_hook
docs: Whether the transfer hook extension is enabled (immutable after init).

fields.name: default_account_frozen
docs: Whether new token accounts are frozen by default (immutable after init).

fields.name: paused
docs: Whether token operations (mint, burn, transfer) are currently paused.

fields.name: total_minted
docs: Cumulative total of tokens minted since initialization.

fields.name: total_burned
docs: Cumulative total of tokens burned since initialization.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed for this account.

types.name: StablecoinInitialized
docs: Event emitted when a new stablecoin is initialized.

fields.name: mint
docs: The mint address of the new stablecoin.

fields.name: authority
docs: The authority who initialized the stablecoin.

fields.name: name

fields.name: symbol

fields.name: decimals

fields.name: enable_permanent_delegate
docs: Whether permanent delegate is enabled.

fields.name: enable_transfer_hook
docs: Whether transfer hook is enabled.

fields.name: default_account_frozen
docs: Whether accounts are frozen by default.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp of initialization.

types.name: TokensUnpausedEvent
